Traphase is super fun QAQ wth

Traphase is kind of like Hearthstone, it's basically 

> build a Team, the order matters 
> > Teams are comprised of "unique roles" and still following the 2 realm rule
> pick Wheels, the order does not matter
> pick Posses, the order does not matter

> Strikes are no-cost (cannot be modified by stagnation / other increase effects), and you have 2 of them
> There are no corresponding "Defense" cards 

All associated cards get shuffled, play till one team is eliminated.
It honestly depends on what you have
It's fun until you keep meeting meta slave team comp
Stuff like helot team that one shot your whole team turn 4 without any skill required

You'll also love when the opponent use stuff like cassiah or karen and get all the buffs or ffects they want meanwhile when you try it it's always the bad draw

ig thankfully neither of those guys are Limiteds, so the "fairness" of the card is at least high, since anyone can pass them in
